items.title: Glan River Canoe Adventure
items.summary: Explore the Glan River by canoe, offering a unique outdoor experience for families. This adventure is highlighted on the cover and in the table of contents.

items.title: Glan River Canoe Adventure
items.summary: Enjoy a relaxing canoe trip on the Glan River, suitable for beginners and families, with scenic views, wildlife, and opportunities for picnics and exploring historic towns like Meisenheim.
items.location: Glan River, Northern Palatinate (Meisenheim, Rehborn, Odernheim)

items.title: Meisenheim Exploration
items.summary: After canoeing the Glan River, explore Meisenheim's historic Schlosskirche, Herzog-Wolfgang-Haus, and relax at local breweries, beer gardens, ice cream parlors, restaurants, and bistros.

items.title: Saar and Nahe Rivers Canoeing
items.summary: Experience peaceful canoeing on the Saar and Nahe rivers, similar to the Glan with great scenery and places to stop, ideal for a relaxing day out.

items.title: Cycling Kaiserslautern
items.summary: Explore the varied landscapes around Kaiserslautern by bike, from the Palatinate Forest mountains to hills, valleys, and rivers like the Lauter or Nahe, or follow the old imperial road.

items.title: Hochspeyer Single-Trail Parcours
items.summary: Enjoy approximately 20 routes, with at least 25% single-trail, at this currently open single-trail course in Hochspeyer.

items.title: Humbergturm/Bremer Hof Cycling
items.summary: Explore popular cycling destinations in the Kaiserslautern area, offering various routes and difficulty levels for bike enthusiasts.

items.title: Ludwigturm Cycling
items.summary: Discover another popular cycling spot located 4 km south of Johanneskreuz, perfect for a day out on your bike.

items.title: Mountainbikepark Pfälzer Wald
items.summary: Although currently closed due to COVID-19, keep an eye out for the reopening of this bike park with locations in Trippstadt and Dahn.

items.title: Hidden Oasis – Luisenpark Mannheim
items.summary: Discover Luisenpark in Mannheim, described as a hidden oasis, suggesting a relaxing and engaging day out for families.

items.title: Luisenpark Mannheim
items.summary: Visit Luisenpark, a 100-acre public park with diverse landscapes, animal encounters, botanical gardens, and a Chinese Tea House.
items.dateHint: open all year around, from 9 a.m. to sunset

items.title: Luisenpark Mannheim
items.summary: This urban oasis offers diverse activities for families, including exotic animals, rare plants, and various festivals, making it a great place for a spring or summer afternoon.

items.title: Black Forest National Park
items.summary: This park offers stunning views and hiking paths like the Lynx path and Lotharpfad. You can take a day trip or camp, and it's known for its waterfalls.

items.title: Eifel National Park
items.summary: Explore 150 miles of paths in this national park, a former WWII training ground, to see native animal and plant species. Free guided tours are available.

items.title: Explore Germany’s National Parks
items.summary: Learn about and plan visits to Germany's National Parks, providing opportunities for outdoor exploration and nature appreciation.

items.title: Kellerwald-Edersee National Park
items.summary: A park for nature lovers, highlighting its Luzulo-beech forest. Experience the park from all angles on the Baumkronenweg am Edersee treetop walkway.

items.title: WAWI Chocolate World
items.summary: Visit WAWI Chocolate World for a sweet experience, likely including tours or tastings, making it an appealing destination for families.

items.title: WAWI Chocolate World
items.summary: Visit a chocolate factory in Pirmasens for free to see chocolate production, learn its history, and taste products. It includes an exhibition, factory outlet, and cafe.

items.title: 4 Great Day Trips in France & Germany
items.summary: Discover four recommended day trips in France and Germany, offering diverse options for short excursions from the KMC area.

items.title: Trier Day Trip
items.summary: Explore Germany's oldest city, founded by Romans. See the Porta Nigra for city views and enjoy the beautiful Palace Garden. A great cultural day out for families.

items.title: Colmar, France
items.summary: Explore Colmar, France, a charming town resembling a country village with winding canals, French and German architecture, and unique boutiques for souvenir shopping.

items.title: Rothenburg ob der Tauber, Germany
items.summary: Experience the medieval charm of Rothenburg ob der Tauber, a German village along the Romantic Road, offering historic city walls, delicious Schneeballs, and unique shops and museums.

items.title: Strasbourg, France
items.summary: Visit Strasbourg, France, a picturesque city near the French and German border, known for its fairytale-like charm, the Rhine River, and the quaint Petite France quarter.

items.title: Dolomites Hiking
items.summary: Experience astounding views and some of the best hiking in the world in the Dolomite mountains, especially around Cortina d’Ampezzo.

items.title: Bellunesi National Park
items.summary: Visit Bellunesi National Park for rugged mountains, secret hikes, and plenty of streams, springs, and greenery, located near the southern end of the Dolomites.

items.title: Cortina d’Ampezzo
items.summary: Discover adventure opportunities along SR 48 from Cortina d’Ampezzo, featuring classic Dolomite spires and peaks, and access to energizing cuisine.

items.title: Dolomites Hiking
items.summary: Explore the Dolomites, a mountainous region in Italy with national parks, rugged terrain, and stunning views. Enjoy hiking, local cuisine like pizza and gelato, and the Prosecco wine region.
